title: Reset a customer's SSO access
body: 1. Find the user in the admin console. 2. Revoke active sessions. 3. Send a re-enrolment link. 4. Confirm MFA re-binds on next login.

title: Investigate wrong invoice totals
body: 1. Pull the billing run id. 2. Compare line items to the metering export. 3. Check for duplicate usage events. 4. Re-run reconciliation and notify finance.

title: Triage a production incident
body: 1. Declare severity. 2. Open an incident channel. 3. Assign an incident commander. 4. Mitigate first, root-cause later. 5. Post a timeline.
